allow: PowerShell($ids = @{}; $names = @\('asset','map','aMove','aLook','aSprint','aLight','aHeavy','aDodge','aParry','aLock','aInter','bMoveComp','bMoveU','bMoveD','bMoveL','bMoveR','bMoveStick','bLookM','bLookS','bSprintK','bSprintP','bLightM','bLightG','bHeavyM','bHeavyG','bDodgeK','bDodgeG','bParryM','bParryG','bLockK','bLockG','bInterK','bInterG'\); foreach \($n in $names\) { $ids[$n] = [guid]::NewGuid\(\).ToString\('N'\) }; $ids.GetEnumerator\(\) | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { "{0}={1}" -f $_.Name, $_.Value })
